title: Leobordea esterhuyseniana
taxonomy: Leobordea esterhuyseniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a bulbous perennial native to South Africa. The classification of Leobordea esterhuyseniana places it within the tribe Irideae. This plant is closely related to other species within the same family, such as the genera Klattia and Lapeirousia. Leobordea esterhuyseniana is further classified as part of the genus Leobordea, which is a small group of plants within the Iridaceae family.
